title: The Unfortunate Mr. Quill
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A failed novelist fakes his own death to get attention — and accidentally becomes the most hunted man in England.
long_description: Percival Quill has spent forty years writing novels that nobody reads. His solution: die dramatically and let posthumous fame finally find him. But when a detective who is his biggest fan proves the drowning was faked, a contract killer is dispatched by a wealthy man who believes Quill saw something he should not have, and the public falls in love with a dead man who will not stay dead — Quill discovers that being noticed is not the same as being known. A darkly comic satire about fame, failure, and the gap between the self we present and the self we are.
